output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY1-090","author":"SarahJ_Hampshire","text":"Just got word that the annual street food festival at Victoria Park will be happening this Saturday from 11am to 8pm. They're having a proper live band set up on the green, plus lots of local stalls selling everything from curry pies to ice cream.
